## I. INTRODUCTION AND SCOPE OF ENGAGEMENT

### 1.1 Purpose of Report
This report is prepared by [Expert Name] (the "Expert") at the request of [Plaintiff Name] (the "Client") for use in the above-referenced litigation. The purpose of this report is to provide an opinion regarding the quantification of lost profits and other economic damages suffered by [Franchisee Name] (the "Franchisee") as a result of the forced closure of their fast-food establishment, located at [Street Address, City, FL], for a period of three (3) months due to structural damage caused by [Cause of Damage, e.g., flood/fire/negligence].

### 1.2 Scope of Analysis
The analysis covers the period from [Start Date of Closure] to [End Date of Closure] (the "Period of Interruption"). The Expert has applied generally accepted methodologies in the field of forensic accounting and business valuation, consistent with Florida case law regarding lost profits.
